affected_pattern: Charges exceed plan limits due to previously included usage now classified as premium
root_cause: Usage type reclassification — a change in usage classification rules caused previously included usage to be reclassified as out-of-plan premium usage, incurring additional charges.
supporting_evidence: SLA Breach RCA Playbook: Usage Type Reclassification pattern
Classification rule change logged 2 weeks before SLA breach
Multiple customers on similar plans affected
recommended_action: Reprocess bills for all affected customers
Issue credits for incorrectly classified usage charges
Implement classification change impact analysis before deployment
